debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
H : ∃ N, ∃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN ≠ {N}
⊢ @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B hB hB' hB'' < D

proof:
by
  obtain ⟨N₀, hN₀, hBN₀⟩ := H
  refine lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') ?_
  intro heq
  apply hBN₀
  have mem_eq : ∀ b ∈ B N₀ hN₀, b = N₀ := fun b hb => by
    have hb_in_ref : b ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'' : Set _) :=
      Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N₀, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN₀, hb⟩⟩
    have hb_in_D : b ∈ D := by rw [← heq]; exact hb_in_ref
    have hb_le_N₀ : b ≤ N₀ := (hB N₀ hN₀).symm ▸ le_sSup hb
    by_contra hne
    have hdisj := D.sSupIndep.pairwiseDisjoint hb_in_D hN₀ hne
    exact hB'' N₀ hN₀ ((le_bot_iff.mp (le_trans (le_inf le_rfl hb_le_N₀)
      (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hdisj))) ▸ hb)
  have hne : (B N₀ hN₀).Nonempty := by
    rw [Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]
    intro hempty
    have hN₀_bot : N₀ = ⊥ := by rw [hB N₀ hN₀, hempty]; exact sSup_empty
    exact D.not_bot_mem (hN₀_bot ▸ hN₀)
  obtain ⟨b₀, hb₀⟩ := hne
  have hN₀_in : N₀ ∈ B N₀ hN₀ := (mem_eq b₀ hb₀).symm ▸ hb₀
  ext a
  simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
  exact ⟨mem_eq a, fun ha => ha ▸ hN₀_in⟩
successful_attempts:

  refine lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') ?_

  apply hBN₀
  have mem_eq : ∀ b ∈ B N₀ hN₀, b = N₀ := fun b hb => by
    have hb_in_ref : b ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'' : Set _) :=
      Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N₀, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN₀, hb⟩⟩
    have hb_in_D : b ∈ D := by rw [← heq]; exact hb_in_ref
    have hb_le_N₀ : b ≤ N₀ := (hB N₀ hN₀).symm ▸ le_sSup hb
    by_contra hne
    have hdisj := D.sSupIndep.pairwiseDisjoint hb_in_D hN₀ hne
    exact hB'' N₀ hN₀ ((le_bot_iff.mp (le_trans (le_inf le_rfl hb_le_N₀)

  have hne : (B N₀ hN₀).Nonempty := by

    intro hempty
